content:

- Confirmed all bug tasks are currently passing true, so bug-first did not force a bug pick this cycle.
- Found multiple non-bug tasks with <passes>false>; chose .ralph/tasks/story-full-verification/03-task-run-full-suite-regression-pass.md as the most logical unblocked next step because task 04 is blocked by it and this advances the verification chain.
- Wrote only that path to .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Next cycle should execute task 03, then reassess failures/bugs created from the full regression run.
